description: A medical physicist is auditing imaging protocols and needs to document the acquisition parameters of the CT Cranium dataset loaded in InVesalius from /home/ga/DICOM/ct_cranium. Extract the total number of slices, image matrix dimensions, in-plane pixel spacing in millimeters, slice thickness in millimeters, and imaging modality. Record these parameters in 'key: value' format using the keys 'slices', 'matrix', 'pixel_spacing', 'slice_thickness', and 'modality' to a text file at /home/ga/Documents/ct_parameters.txt.
